decisions.description: MIS-7317 - Check if the form name in the web form name contains app or shopper and update the counter

decisions.label: Add Counter value

rules.name: True
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR (6 AND 7 AND 8))
rules.label: True

decisions.description: MIS-6835 CancellationSurvey_Date__c
decisions.name: Cancelation_Reason_populated
decisions.label: Cancelation Reason populated

rules.name: Manual_Unsync_SFMC_true_Opt_In
rules.label: Manual Unsync SFMC = true + Opt In

decisions.description: MIS-3589 A field on lead and contact which codify the first time a lead is Fit Score A-C and Email Domain contains Company
decisions.name: First_A_C_Company_Timestamp
decisions.label: First A-C Company Timestamp

decisions.description: MIS-7184 - When Aligned Contact Source is not blank, change lead source to aligned
decisions.name: Is_Contact_Aligned
decisions.label: Is Contact Aligned

rules.label: Lead Source Changed to Value from list

decisions.name: Rule_CRT_Current_Registration_Type
decisions.label: Rule (CRT) Current Registration Type

decisions.description: If the contact status was changed to the “Do not contact” value the email and phone opt-out should be checked as TRUE and a banner should be added
decisions.name: Rule_DNC_Status_was_changed_to_Do_not_contact
decisions.label: *Rule(DNC)* - Status was changed to 'Do not contact'

rules.name: Status_was_changed_to_Do_not_contact
rules.label: Status was changed to 'Do not contact'

decisions.description: It will be populated from the field 'Form_Complete_URL_c' but only if it's empty. MIS-2044
decisions.name: Rule_FC_Update_First_Form_Complete_URL

decisions.description: Collect first value from 'Form Location URL'
decisions.name: Rule_FLU_First_Value_From_Form_Location_URL
decisions.label: *Rule (FLU)* - First Value From 'Form Location URL'

decisions.name: Rule_INCB_ISNEW_and_Country_Blank
decisions.label: *Rule (INCB)* - ISNEW and Country Blank

rules.name: MSL_Contact_Status_to_SDR_Prospecting
rules.label: MSL - Contact Status to SDR Prospecting

rules.name: MSL_Contact_Status_to_Nurture
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10)

rightValue.stringValue: Not a Good Fit: Use Case / Persona / Industry
Not Ready / Bad Timing / No Interest

rules.label: MSL - Contact Status to Nurture

decisions.description: if phone/ email opt out was checked as TRUE the contact status should be changed to “Do not contact”
decisions.name: Rule_PET_Phone_email_opt_out_was_checked_as_TRUE
decisions.label: *Rule(PET)* - Phone/email opt out was checked as TRUE

rules.name: Phone_email_opt_out_was_checked_as_TRUE
rules.label: Phone/email opt out was checked as TRUE

decisions.description:
MIS-1191: Check if the Contact is converted from Lead with Partnership RT
New Contact && Lead RT = Partnership && Contact RT <> Partnership
decisions.name: Rule_PRT_Change_to_Partnership_RT
decisions.label: *Rule (PRT)* - Change to Partnership RT?

decisions.description: Set Wolves RT upon conversion
decisions.name: Rule_RTW_Set_Wolves_RT_upon_conversion
decisions.label: *Rule (RTW)* - Set Wolves RT upon conversion

decisions.description: SDR Chat DateTime
decisions.name: Rule_SCD_SDR_Chat_DateTime
decisions.label: *Rule (SCD)* - SDR Chat DateTime

rules.name: Not_SalesOps_Owned
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND NOT 2) OR (3 AND 4 AND NOT 2)
rules.label: Not SalesOps Owned

decisions.description: MQL = True and RT = Panel Acquisition(Wolves)
decisions.name: Rule_UMQLW_UnMQL_Wolves
decisions.label: *Rule (UMQLW)* - UnMQL Wolves

rules.name: MQL_True_and_RT_Panel_Acquisition
rules.label: MQL = True and RT = Panel Acquisition

decisions.description: MIS-5740 Added Last Owner Assigned date
decisions.name: Rule_UOME_Update_Owner_s_Manager_Email_Last_Owner_Assigned_Date
decisions.label: *Rule (UOME)* - Update Owner's Manager Email & Last Owner Assigned Date

MIS-1129
Contact Status changed from Unqualified
decisions.name: Rule_UQ_Status_Changed_from_unqualified
decisions.label: *Rule (UQ)* - Status Changed from unqualified?

rules.name: Is_new_or_RT_is_changed
rules.label: Is new or RT is changed

rules.name: Has_any_relevant_SI_field_changed
rules.label: Has any relevant SI field changed

decisions.description: MIS-6321 - Sync to SFMC logic update MIS-5305
decisions.name: Sync_to_sfmc
decisions.label: Sync to sfmc

decisions.description: based on Registration Type, LinkedIn campaign, and Email Address Domain Type
decisions.name: Update_Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details
decisions.label: Update Email Address Domain Type Details

rules.name: Copy_from_Email_Address_domain_type
rules.label: Copy from Email Address domain type

decisions.name: Was_Sync_to_SFMC_changed_to_TRUE
decisions.label: Was Sync to SFMC changed to TRUE?

Flow.description: MIS-8389 - Added logic to calc si employee min / max + si enrichment timestamp update MIS-8199 - MSL - Contact Status to SDR Prospecting MIS-7999 - Added Student Bypass SFMC checkbox MIS-7184 MIS-7253 - Add Counter Field for Web Form Submissions on Lead/Contact MIS-7190-Data Quality Controls: Contact owner <> Account owner MIS-7238 - Removed Intail AI logic MIS-6931 - Lugia Linkedin Profile MIS-6835 CancellationSurvey_Date__c MIS-6666 - MIR Status Last Modified By MIS-6504 - Sync to SFMC Timestamp MIS-6321 - Sync to SFMC logic update MIS-6022 - WhatsApp Opt Out Timestamp MIS-6072 - MIR Status Updates MIS-6050 - Change Last Owner Assigned to Date/Time MIS-5968 - Count MIR Owners MIS-5740 - Update Last Owner Assigned Date MIS-5745 - Update Country from Account MIS-5529 - first mql date

formulas.description: Check the last 90 days time stamp. Used for "Date/Time" fields.
formulas.name: For_Last_90_Days_Date_Time

formulas.description: Extracts the number after the dash from SI_Employees_Type__c
formulas.name: fr_EmployeesMax

formulas.description: Extracts the number before the dash from SI_Employees_Type__c
formulas.name: fr_EmployeesMin

formulas.description: Checks if SI_Employees_Type__c is in valid "number-number" format: not blank, contains a dash not at start or end, and left value is not greater than right value
formulas.name: fr_IsValidFormat
formulas.expression: AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c})), FIND("-", {!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}) > 1, FIND("-", {!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}) < LEN({!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}), VALUE(LEFT({!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}, FIND("-", {!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}) - 1)) <= VALUE(MID({!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}, FIND("-", {!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}) + 1, LEN({!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}))) )

formulas.description: MIS-6321 - Sync to SFMC logic update
formulas.name: FR_SyncToSFMC
formulas.expression: AND( {!sourcecontainoutbound} = False, {!$Record.HasOptedOutOfEmail} = False, {!$Record.Manual_Unsync_SFMC__c} = False, OR( AND( {!$Record.RecordType.Name} = 'Default', Text({!$Record.Original_Lead_Source__c}) <> 'Test LinkedIn Outbound - Sales navigator' ), AND( NOT(REGEX(BLANKVALUE(LOWER({!$Record.Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c}), ""), ".*(support|no cu).*")), NOT(REGEX(BLANKVALUE(LOWER({!$Record.Base_Product__c}), ""), ".*(enrichment|intelligence suite).*")), ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.Strategic_Pod__c})), TEXT({!$Record.SW_Fit_Score__c}) = 'S', TEXT({!$Record.Status__c}) <> "Replied", TEXT({!$Record.Status__c}) <> "SDR Prospecting", {!$Record.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c} > {!Now_Minus_30_Days}, NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c})) ) ) )

formulas.name: LeadSourceValueCheck
formulas.expression: OR( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Pro'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'ContactForm'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Webinar'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Webinar On Demand'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'White Paper'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Partnership - Webinar'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Partnership - Virtual Events'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Partnership - F2F Events'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Partnership - Content'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Internal - Webinars'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Internal - Virtual Events'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Internal - F2F Event') )

formulas.name: sourcecontainoutbound
formulas.expression:
IF( CONTAINS(TEXT({!$Record.LeadSource}) , "Outbound") && CONTAINS(TEXT({!$Record.Original_Lead_Source__c}) ,"Outbound") && TEXT({!$Record.MailingCountryCode}) <> 'US', true, IF( (ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.LeadSource})) || ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.Original_Lead_Source__c})))&& (CONTAINS( text({!$Record.LeadSource}) , "Outbound") || CONTAINS(TEXT({!$Record.Original_Lead_Source__c}) ,"Outbound")) && text({!$Record.MailingCountryCode}) <> 'US', true,false )
)

Flow.label: Contact Before Save Flow Updates
